message:
feat(codegen): Use TypedClosure for reduced closure monomorphization

Phase 10 of anytype monomorphization reduction:
- Use TypedClosure0 for 0-param closures unconditionally (no arg type issues)
- Use TypedClosure1-7 when all params have explicit type annotations
- Track all_params_typed flag to determine TypedClosure eligibility
- Track return_type_str for TypedClosure instantiation
- Fall back to AnyClosure when anytype params or unknown return types

This reduces per-call-site monomorphization for closures by using
fixed-signature wrappers when possible. 0-param closures (common in
unittest methods) now always use TypedClosure0.
